debug_info.goal:
case mk.nil.cons
a : Type
n : a
ns : List a
ok :
  ([].isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1) ∧
    ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → [].isEmpty = true ∨ [].length = 1)
⊢ (@Chapter3.List.init.match_1 a (fun x => List a) (ns.reverse ++ [n]) (fun _ => []) (fun head => []) fun x xs =>
      x :: Chapter3.List.init a xs) =
    (if h : ns = [] then SymList.splitInTwoSL [] else { lhs := ns, rhs := [], ok := ⋯ }).rhs ++
      (if h : ns = [] then SymList.splitInTwoSL [] else { lhs := ns, rhs := [], ok := ⋯ }).lhs.reverse

proof:
have : ns = [] := by
          have h := ok.1 rfl
          simp at h
          cases ns
          · rfl
          · contradiction
        subst this
        rfl
failed_attempts:
have : ∀ l x, List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
          intro l x
          induction l <;> simp [List.init, *]
        simp [this]
        cases ns <;> simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL]

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, SymList.nil]
        | cons m ms =>
          simp at ok
          contradiction

by_cases h : ns = []
        · subst h
          simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        · simp [h]
          have : ∀ l x, List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
            intro l x
            induction l with
            | nil => simp [List.init]
            | cons y ys ih =>
              simp only [List.cons_append]
              cases ys <;> simp [List.init, ih]
          rw [this]

cases ns <;> simp [List.init]
        have h := ok.1 rfl
        simp at h
        contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [List.init]
        | cons m ms =>
          have := ok.1 rfl
          simp at this
          cases this

split
        · simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        · have : ∀ l x, List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
            intro l x
            induction l <;> simp [List.init, *]
          rw [this]

simp at ok
        cases ns with
        | nil => simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, List.init]
        | cons _ _ => simp at ok; contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons m ms =>
          simp at ok
          contradiction

cases ns
        · simp [SymList.fromSL, List.init]
        · have := ok.1 rfl
          simp at this
          contradiction

by_cases h : ns = []
        · simp [h, List.init]
        · simp [h]
          have aux (l) (x : a) : List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
            induction l <;> simp [List.init] at *
            case cons y ys ih => cases ys <;> simp_all [List.init]
          rw [List.reverse_cons, aux]

have : ns = [] := by
          cases ok with | intro h _ =>
          simp at h
          cases ns
          · rfl
          · contradiction
        subst this
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil]

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [List.init]
        | cons m ms =>
          simp [List.isEmpty] at ok
          have h := ok.1 rfl
          simp at h
          contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons m ms =>
          simp
          have : ∀ l, List.init (l ++ [n]) = l := by
            intro l
            induction l with
            | nil => rfl
            | cons x xs ih => cases xs <;> simp [List.init, ih]
          simp [this]

have h : ns = [] := by
          cases ok with
          | intro h _ =>
            simp at h
            cases ns
            · rfl
            · simp at h
        subst h
        simp

cases ns
        · simp
        · simp at ok; have := ok.1 rfl; contradiction

have h : ∀ l (x : a), List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
          intro l x
          induction l with
          | nil => rfl
          | cons y ys ih => simp [List.init, ih]
        simp [h]
        cases ns <;> simp

split
        · simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        · simp [List.init]
          have : ∀ l a, List.init (l ++ [a]) = l := by
            intro l a
            induction l with
            | nil => simp [List.init]
            | cons x xs ih => cases xs <;> simp [List.init, ih]
          rw [this]

have : ns = [] := by
          have h := ok.1
          simp at h
          cases ns
          · rfl
          · simp at h; contradiction
        subst this
        simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]

have : ns = [] := by
          cases ok with | intro h _ =>
          simp at h
          cases ns <;> simp_all
        subst this
        simp [List.init]

cases ns
        · simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        · simp at ok; contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp
        | cons n' ns' =>
          simp at ok
          contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons m ms =>
          cases ok
          simp at *
          contradiction

have h : ∀ l (x : a), List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
          intro l x
          induction l with
          | nil => simp [List.init]
          | cons y ys ih =>
            simp [List.init]
            split
            · simp_all
            · rw [ih]
        rw [h]

have : ∀ l (x : a), List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
          intro l x
          induction l <;> simp [List.init, *]
        split <;> simp [this, List.init]

have : ns = [] := by
          have h := ok.1 rfl
          simp at h
          cases ns <;> simp_all
        subst this
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.init]

have h := ok.1
        simp at h
        cases ns
        · simp [List.init]
        · simp at h; contradiction
cases ns <;> simp_all
successful_attempts:
have : ns = [] := by
          have h := ok.1 rfl
          simp at h
          cases ns
          · rfl
          · contradiction
        subst this
        rfl

cases ns with
        | nil =>
          simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons m ms =>
          simp at ok

have h := ok.1 rfl
        simp at h
        cases ns with
        | nil => simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons _ _ => contradiction

have : ns = [] := by
          have h := ok.1 rfl
          simp at h
          cases ns
          · rfl
          · contradiction
        subst this
        rfl

have h : ns = [] := by
          have h := ok.1 rfl
          simp at h
          cases ns <;> simp_all
        subst h
        rfl
